from flask import Flask, jsonify

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route("/health")
def health_check():
    result = db.execute("SELECT 1").fetchone()
    return jsonify({"status": "healthy" if result else "unhealthy"})

@app.route("/ready")
def readiness_check():
    try:
        result = db.execute("SELECT 1").fetchone()
        db_ok = result is not None
    except Exception:
        db_ok = False
    return jsonify({"ready": db_ok})
